title: T4 two-hands coverage
prompt: Open tests/run-headless.js. In the SOLVE/HANDS section there are these lines in order: P.selectVersion('full'); then an ok(...) asserting Hard uses BOTH hands; then P.selectVersion('core'). Add exactly ONE new assertion BETWEEN the both-hands ok(...) line and the P.selectVersion('core') line, so it runs while the full version is active: ok(P.Song.handsUsed.size === 2, 'full version uses exactly two hands'). Use the existing ok helper. Do not move or change any existing line. Edit ONLY tests/run-headless.js. Do not create, import, or add any other files.
